meaning: Binyah means born here — Sea Island / Gullah Geechee identity.

products.name: Binyah Sea Islands Tee
products.printful_catalog_hint: Unisex Softstyle T-Shirt or similar Bella+Canvas style
products.listing_title: Binyah Gullah Geechee Tee | Born Here Sea Islands Heritage Shirt
products.listing_description:
Binyah means born here. Wear Lowcountry pride with this Gullah Geechee Biz heritage tee — marsh green and gold design rooted in Sea Island culture.

Printed on demand by Printful and shipped after you order. Support independent Gullah Geechee cultural documentation.

• Unisex fit
• Soft cotton blend (see product specs)
• Design by Gullah Geechee Biz
• Printed only when ordered — no warehouse waste
products.tags: gullah geechee, binyah, sea islands, lowcountry, heritage tee, black history, cultural pride, south carolina, beaufort
products.tiktok_hook: In Gullah Geechee, Binyah means born here. This shirt is for the people of the Sea Islands.
products.pinterest_title: Binyah Sea Islands Heritage Tee | Gullah Geechee Biz
products.cultural_notes: Binyah is community language for born-here identity. Design uses marsh motif, not fake tribal clip art.
products.shipping_note: Print-on-demand via Printful after Stripe payment. Shipping calculated at fulfillment.
